starter.audience: Exploring the site: sign in, browse Account, and compare the commercial surface with a source build—no paid verification runs on this tier.
starter.valueUnlock: Account access only. Published-CLI verification, API keys, quota, and CI enforcement start on Individual or higher; use a repository build for free contract verification without a subscription.

individual.audience: Solo engineers who want the published CLI, API keys, and monthly quota for verification and CI enforcement without team-scale volume.
individual.valueUnlock: First paid tier that unlocks published-package verification with reserve-backed quota, plus enforce and CI lock flows on the same subscription.

team.audience: Engineering teams running repeatable verification in shared CI with steady production or staging volume.
team.valueUnlock: Higher monthly quota for multi-repo or multi-service pipelines; enforce and CI locks stay on the same subscription.

business.audience: High-volume pipelines or many services that need headroom, predictable billing, and room to grow.
business.valueUnlock: Highest self-serve quota on published-package verification; enforce and CI locks remain on the same subscription.

enterprise.audience: Organizations that need procurement-friendly buying, custom limits, or tailored terms.
enterprise.valueUnlock: Sales-led onboarding, tailored volume, and contract terms outside self-serve checkout.
